backendCareerRoutes.evidence: backend/routes/api.php:459-491 defines /api/v0.5 career routes for attribution, family, first-wave links, resolve, jobs, recommendations, shortlist, runtime-config, transition-preview, search, datasets, and sitemap-source.

careerJobPublicResolution.evidence: CareerJobDetailController + CareerJobDetailBundleBuilder + CareerJobDetailResource expose backend-governed identity, trust, SEO contract, structured_data, and display_surface_v1.

careerRecommendationBoundary.evidence: CareerRecommendationDetailBundleBuilder exposes snapshot-backed recommendation detail data; Phase 5A keeps this as MBTI next_step_only / snapshot support.

aliasCanonicalHandling.evidence: CareerAliasPage redirects aliases to canonical jobs/guides/families; CareerResolvePage is noindex and redirects resolved targets.

seoGeoExposure.evidence: next-sitemap.config.js, lib/seo/backendSitemapSource.ts, app/llms.txt/route.ts, and app/llms-full.txt/route.ts use backend-gated career job paths and deny recommendation LLMS exposure.

savedCareersBoundary.evidence: CareerShortlistService persists CareerShortlistItem and attaches snapshot/profile projection foreign keys; no profile write API observed, but boundary requires explicit lifecycle decision.

requiredFixesBeforePhase5B.item: Do not start Phase 6 graph, Phase 7 freemium, Phase 9 recommendation, or Phase 10 memory from these artifacts.
Sample live career job detail payloads and frontend pages for canonical, JSON-LD, FAQ, evidence container, and robots parity.
Verify llms.txt and llms-full.txt outputs keep career recommendations excluded while allowing only backend-gated career job entries.
Clarify saved-careers lifecycle: preference store only, no UASP profile memory, no recommendation evidence, no personality inference.
Run deterministic alias/canonical samples for representative English, Chinese, ambiguous, and unresolved queries.
Confirm claimPermissions are present for career display surfaces before strong fit, salary, market, or AI sections render.

requiredHumanDecisions: Whether saved-careers snapshot foreign keys are acceptable as preference-store provenance without becoming profile memory.
Whether Career Decision may ever move beyond MBTI snapshot / next_step_only support.
Whether career job details with visible evidence may become stronger llms-full candidates, without treating LLMS as semantic graph truth.
Whether Phase 5B is remediation/verification only or may include narrow trust-runtime fixes.
nextRecommendedPhase: Phase 5B Career Public Trust Hardening and Live Parity Verification
phase5BConditions: Do not stack on an unrelated backend branch.
Do not include pre-existing untracked frontend artifacts.
Limit Phase 5B to trust hardening, parity verification, and boundary remediation.
Keep runtime expansion, graph expansion, freemium expansion, recommendation expansion, and profile memory blocked.
